Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2E64 "BOUNTYBOBSTRIKESBACK-2E64" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Bounty Bob Strikes Back (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: As the original did not have a loading screen, the one included was converted from the Spectrum version by DATA-LAND of Technische Maschinenfabrik (https://csdb.dk/scener/?id=4845).
